name: Jewel Christmas
description: It's Xmas time and what better way to celebrate than with some explosive matching action! Match three gingerbread men, stockings, trees, candy canes, presents or baubles and watch them explode! With five festive game modes and more challenges along the way this game is a perfect gift for you this Xmas! Expect plenty of jewel busting, exploding match 3 heaven with this cracker of a game!
instructions: Match any 3 decorations in a line to pop them Line up 4 or more of the same decorations and create Xmas Explosion decorations Match them or try to combine them to create even bigger blasts The more decorations you pop the more points you score

There are about 30+ unique levels for you to challenge yourself. Bosses change with every stage and difficulty becomes more fun after clearing each level.
instructions: Connect Gems to win The Goal of the Game is to have the Hero reach the flag In order to move the horse forward you need to create a chain of 3 or more poisonous mushrooms but they also deplete your life Bigger the chain - stronger the attack A

name: Food Truck Chef™ Cooking Games

name: Combo Snake
description: Control the snake to move and collect gems. Collecting gems of the same color will create nodes of the corresponding color on the snakes body. When three nodes of the same color are connected, they will be automatically eliminated. Eliminating nodes can earn you extra points. Hitting the wall or colliding with itself will lead to the end of the game. Successfully eliminating the entire snakes body results in a game victory.

name: Lets Create with Tom and Jerry
description: Play Let's Create with Tom and Jerry Game online in your web browser and mobile at Superkidgames.com for free and more html5 games. This game Lets Create with Tom and Jerry, we have had a really awesome time playing it ourselves, so there is no doubt in our minds that the same is going to be applying to your own time with it also, as there is never a bad time to have fun with lovable characters like Tom and Jerry! In case you want to learn more about how these creativity games work, allow us to teach you here. You begin by choosing one of the available black and white pictures, and you are then going to use the several buttons and tools all around the image, which you can color, modify, and decorate however you see fit, since this is a game all about using your imagination to create new and interesting pictures out of the existing ones. Join in on the fun right now, and stick around, since more awesome games are coming for you today, and we want you to check them out also!
